channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Quebec Liberals Position Themselves as the Federalist Choice Ahead of Election
item.description: Quebec Liberal Leader Charles Milliard is presenting his party as the only clearly federalist option in the province as it heads toward the upcoming general election in October. Speaking at the party ...

item.title: Ottawa authorities investigate coyote attack on local resident
item.description: The City of Ottawa is currently investigating an incident in which a person was reportedly injured by a coyote. Local authorities have not yet released full details regarding the circumstances of the ...

item.title: Trump Shares AI-Generated Posts Targeting Judge Richard Leon, Rosie O'Donnell, and Barack Obama
item.description: President Donald Trump used his Truth Social platform to publish a series of AI-generated images and messages aimed at several political and public figures. The most significant post focused on U.S. D...

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo announced as surprise performer at Primavera Sound Barcelona
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo has been confirmed as a surprise performer at Primavera Sound in Barcelona, appearing on the festival’s penultimate day at Parc del Fòrum. The announcement was first teased via the fest...

item.title: Palma the Dog Became a Symbol of Loyalty After Waiting Two Years at Moscow’s Vnukovo Airport
item.description: Palma, a German Shepherd abandoned at Moscow’s Vnukovo Airport in 1974, became one of the Soviet Union’s most memorable stories of animal loyalty. According to the account, Palma’s owner attempted to ...

item.title: Senior White House AI Advisor Sriram Krishnan Plans to Resign to Focus on Tech Policy
item.description: Sriram Krishnan, the senior White House policy advisor on artificial intelligence, is preparing to resign from his position by the end of June 2026, according to sources cited by the Washington Post. ...

item.title: Marco Rubio comments highlight concerns about President Trump's mental and physical health
item.description: During a recent House Foreign Relations Committee hearing, Secretary of State Marco Rubio made a remark intended to praise President Trump's work ethic but ended up raising concerns about his health. ...

item.title: Report Says Senior Trump Officials Were Vulnerable to Israeli Intelligence Collection Due to Personal Phone Use
item.description: A report by The New York Times expanded on earlier revelations that the Pentagon has elevated its counterintelligence threat assessment for Israel to the highest level, described as 'critical.' Accord...

item.title: Ivanka Trump Criticized for Discussing Luxury Island Purchase Amid Economic Concerns
item.description: Ivanka Trump recently discussed her excitement over purchasing a 1,400-acre luxury Mediterranean island off the coast of Albania in a podcast interview. She spoke about her vision for developing a res...

item.title: Sen. John Curtis Criticizes Defense Department Classification of LDS Church as Non-Christian
item.description: Sen. John Curtis, a Republican from Utah, publicly criticized the Department of Defense after it reduced the number of officially recognized religious classifications used within the military from mor...

item.title: CTV Ottawa Broadcasts 43rd Annual CHEO Telethon to Benefit Children’s Hospital
item.description: Today, CTV Ottawa is hosting the 43rd annual CHEO Telethon, an event dedicated to raising funds for the Children’s Hospital of Eastern Ontario. The telethon features inspiring stories from patients su...

item.title: US Expands Sterile Fly Program After Screwworm Detected in Texas
item.description: The United States is responding to the reappearance of the New World screwworm, a flesh-eating parasitic fly that was recently detected in a calf in southern Texas. The pest had been eradicated from t...

item.title: Australians assess implications of upcoming capital gains tax reforms
item.description: Following the federal budget announced on 12 May 2026, Australians are grappling with significant changes to capital gains tax (CGT) and negative gearing rules. The reforms, set to take effect from 1 ...

item.title: Blitzboks secure second consecutive SVNS World Championship title with quarter-final victory over Fiji
item.description: The Blitzboks were crowned HSBC SVNS World Champions for a second consecutive season after a dramatic day of action at the Bordeaux Sevens in France. South Africa secured the world title following a h...

item.title: Immigration Lawyers Raise Concerns Over Accelerated Deportation Court Proceedings
item.description: Immigration attorneys and advocacy groups are expressing concern over what they describe as a largely undisclosed effort by federal authorities to accelerate immigration court proceedings and deportat...

item.title: RFK Jr.-aligned MAHA groups focus on safe races while avoiding key 2026 battlegrounds
item.description: A political effort tied to Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr., known as the Make America Healthy Again (MAHA) movement, is facing criticism for its limited impact on competitive...

item.title: Zanzibar Police Conclude Ashly Robinson Died by Suicide After Investigation
item.description: Authorities in Zanzibar have officially closed their investigation into the death of Ashly Robinson, a U.S.-based influencer who was found hanging in her hotel room on April 8, 2026. According to poli...

item.title: Restoration work in Victoria uncovers historic Hudson’s Bay warehouse wall artifacts
item.description: During restoration work beneath Wharf Street in Victoria, British Columbia, crews uncovered a sealed subterranean chamber linked to one of the city’s oldest colonial structures. The discovery was made...

item.title: Kimi Antonelli secures pole in Monaco as Red Bull shows improvement
item.description: Italian Mercedes driver Kimi Antonelli continued his dominant start to the 2026 Formula One season by claiming pole position at the Monaco Grand Prix. Demonstrating exceptional control and confidence ...

item.title: Former AIADMK MLA M. Rajamuthu refutes claims of joining Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam
item.description: Former Veerapandi MLA M. Rajamuthu has firmly denied circulating reports that he has joined the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), calling such claims false and misleading. The clarification came on June...
